title: French-Style Cheese Wrap
description: A simple wrap filled with melted cheese and crusty bread, inspired by French cuisine.

ingredients.name: Savory cheese
ingredients.notes: optional, e.g. brie or goat cheese

instructions: Preheat a panini press or grill to medium heat.
Place a slice of crusty bread on the press or grill.
Top with a slice of Comte cheese, followed by another slice of crusty bread.
Add a slice of savory cheese, if using.
Top with the final slice of crusty bread.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, or until the bread is toasted and the cheese is melted.
Remove from heat and let cool for 1 minute.
